results.rendered_html:
vijigīṣu a.
1 Desirous of victory, wishing to conquer; yaśase vijigīṣūṇāṃ  R. 1. 7. 
2 Emulous, ambitious.
— ṣuḥ
1 A warrior, a hero.
2 Antagonist, a disputant, an opponent.
